M0895_HOSP_VN_PULM (M0895) Deep Vein Thrombosis/Pulmonary Embolus Reason for hospitalization: deep vein thrombosis, pulmonary embolus. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0895_HOSP_CF_FLDS (M0895) Exacerbation of CHF/Fluid Overload/Heart Failure Reason for hospitalization: exacerbation of CHF, fluid overload, heart failure. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
